---
title: modifies-value-receiver
description: "Detect value receiver mutation."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect value receiver mutation. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func (item Item) Rename(name string) { item.Name = name }
```

## Good

```go
func (item *Item) Rename(name string) { item.Name = name }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only modifies-value-receiver`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
